name: color-by
description: Color-by modes for zone plot items. These include FLAC2D and FLAC3D result attributes; z, xz, yz, and zz components are FLAC3D-only.

modes.description: Color zones by a scalar result or property.
modes.notes: Use continuous color-options for numeric values. Out-of-plane stress components are FLAC3D-only.

modes.description: Color zones by vector magnitude or vector components.
modes.notes: Vector values may display x/y/z components depending on the target product dimension.

modes.description: Color zones by a categorical value.
examples: color-by text-attribute "group" 'Any' color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true
color-by text-attribute "model" color-options named maximum-names 1000000 name-controls true
modes.notes: Use named color-options for group/model/id values.
